samples.name: Logic Gates
samples.description: Explore the functionality and behavior of basic logic gates, including AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, and XNOR, through interactive demonstrations.

samples.name: Plot Signals
samples.description: Learn how to visualize and analyze signal data by plotting dynamic waveforms and graphs in this simple example.

samples.name: Basic Feedback
samples.description: Explore the principles of feedback systems and learn how to implement a basic feedback loop for computational tasks.

samples.name: Computing PI
samples.description: Discover a mathematical approach to calculate the value of the constant π (PI) using iterative or statistical methods.

samples.name: CSV Data Processing
samples.description: Understand how to efficiently import, process, and export data using CSV files in this practical demonstration.

samples.name: First Order & Second Order Models
samples.description: Analyze and simulate the dynamic behavior of first-order and second-order systems with step response and parameter variations.

samples.name: Gaussian Distribution
samples.description: Understand the emergence of Gaussian distribution by summing uniform random variables in this illustrative example.

samples.name: Proportional, Integral, and Derivative Control
samples.description: Implement and compare the effects of P, I, and D control strategies on a first-order system, demonstrating the principles of PID control.

samples.name: SAR ADC
samples.description: Learn the working mechanism of a Successive Approximation Register (SAR) Analog-to-Digital Converter through this detailed example.

samples.name: Hamming Code
samples.description: Understand error detection and correction by exploring the schematic and operation of Hamming code in communication systems.

samples.name: 3-Bit Binary Adder
samples.description: Design and simulate the operation of a 3-bit binary adder, showcasing how binary addition is performed electronically.
